title: crotalaria sengensis
intro: Crotalaria sengensis, also known as the Sengal rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria sengensis include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria sengensis is often used to make a tea or infusion that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
